---
title: "CH₄ Flux Prediction Using Transfer Entropy-based IMV-LSTM"
date: "2026-04-10"
author: "Prof. Shin (phyzik)"
categories: [Causal Inference, Deep Learning, Time Series, Python]
image: "thumbnail.png"
description: |
  We introduce a TE-IMV-LSTM framework that integrates Transfer Entropy as a 
  variable selection criterion into the IMV-LSTM architecture, validated on FLUXNET CH₄ data.
---

## Overview

Transfer Entropy (TE) is a nonlinear causality measure based on information theory.

```python
import numpy as np

def transfer_entropy(X, Y, k=1, bins=10):
    X_d = np.digitize(X, np.histogram_bin_edges(X, bins=bins))
    Y_d = np.digitize(Y, np.histogram_bin_edges(Y, bins=bins))
    # TE computation logic
    return te
```

## Results

| Model | RMSE | R² |
|-------|------|-----|
| Vanilla LSTM | 0.124 | 0.821 |
| **TE-IMV-LSTM** | **0.091** | **0.901** |
